lecture_rule: Order price should stay within an accepted band around last traded price or circuit range
why_it_exists: Prevents obvious fat-finger and runaway algo orders

lecture_rule: Each instrument has a maximum order size or freeze quantity
why_it_exists: Prevents oversized orders from overwhelming the market

lecture_rule: Do not use derivatives to increase open interest beyond threshold
why_it_exists: Porsche/VW showed derivatives can squeeze the underlying free float

lecture_rule: Maximum client position in a stock or derivative contract
why_it_exists: Prevents hidden concentration and forced-cover spirals

lecture_rule: Check overnight sellable shares and delivery availability
why_it_exists: Avoids creating obligations the account cannot settle
